case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR SEP-02-2003 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

calendar.matters:
MOTION To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond
Off Calendar Sep-05-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required". Therefore, the Court denied DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond. (KMM/301/) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

MOTION To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond
Off Calendar Sep-02-2003 Continued To Sep-05-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Stephen Benitzhar, Esq., Litigation Counselor of RANGER INSURANCE CO. 408/501-7892, for defendant RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY, moving to set aside Summary Judgment, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT continued DEFENDANT RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION To Set Aside Summary Judgment, Discharge Forfeiture And Exonerate Bail Bond to September 5, 2003. Counsel is to notify opposing party of the continued hearing date. (KMM/301) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
